idea-plugin.name: BuildPilot
idea-plugin.description:
BuildPilot 🚀

Trigger Jenkins builds directly from IntelliJ / WebStorm. No browser, no CLI — just click and deploy.

Jenkins | CI | CD | Build | Deploy | DevOps

Features

  • 🔑 One-time Jenkins login with API token
  • 📋 Auto-discover all Jenkins jobs
  • 📂 Grouped jobs by prefix with collapsible sections
  • 🔍 Inline search — filter jobs in real-time
  • 📌 Pin/unpin jobs and groups to the top
  • ▶️ Trigger parameterized builds from tool window
  • ⏹️ Stop running builds directly from history
  • 📊 Live build summary with console output
  • 📜 Build history with running/completed status
  • 🔔 Slack DM notifications
  • 🔒 OWASP-hardened security (SSRF, XSS, input validation)

Security

  • Credentials stored in OS keychain (PasswordSafe) — never plaintext
  • SSRF protection — private IPs and metadata endpoints blocked
  • Input validation — build params allowlisted, reserved keys blocked
  • Error sanitization — credentials never leak in error messages
  • Request timeouts on all HTTP calls

Supported IDEs

  • IntelliJ IDEA (Community & Ultimate)
  • WebStorm
  • Android Studio
  • PyCharm
  • GoLand
  • All JetBrains IDEs (2023.3+)
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Jenkins login, auto-discover jobs, trigger builds
  • Grouped jobs with search and pin/unpin
  • Live build summary with console output
  • Stop running builds from history
  • Slack notifications
  • OWASP security hardening (SSRF, input validation, error sanitization)
